Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type) Or notDeveloper
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

StyledText.Data: Number of Links in this Title: <<Number of Links>>

Calculation.Text: Case(IsEmpty(FAT Title::gObjectGroup) ; True; FAT Link::Object Group = FAT Title::gObjectGroup)
FAT Link::Name & "¶" & FAT Link::Author description & "¶" & FAT Link::Link ModifierValue
FAT Link::Name & "¶" & FAT Link::Author description & "¶" & FAT Link::Link ModifierValue

StyledText.Data: Create a Link from any package, chapter, page or page item you want to navigate to. Or create an external link or a file download link from here.
Links are global in the whole Title.
A Link is a navigation item that can be added to page items or lists. It can link to a location both inside the Title and to an external URL.

Calculation.Text: "Remove IO Group - this will NOT remove any IOs"
"This IO group contain " & FAT Object Group::Number of IOs & " IOs."

StyledText.Data: Create Groups and assign IOs, Lists and Links to a group to make authoring easier.
